What We Do

SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Built on Chicago Craftsmanship

Founded in 2012 by Chicago native Mark Reynolds, Horizon Kitchen Remodel began with a mission to preserve the architectural integrity of local homes while introducing contemporary conveniences. What started as a two-person operation in Logan Square has grown into a team serving the entire metro area.

We approach every project with Midwestern pragmatism and designer sensibilities. Our process balances meticulous planning with adaptability for Chicago's unpredictable weather and aging home quirks. Cabinetry is test-fitted in our West Town workshop before installation to account for settling foundations.

When we're not remodeling kitchens, you'll find our team volunteering at neighborhood housing initiatives or sponsoring local Little League teams. We believe beautiful spaces should be accessible to all Chicagoans.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Kitchen Remodel

Weather-Wise Materials

We specify finishes that withstand Chicago's freeze-thaw cycles and lake-effect humidity without sacrificing style.

Historic Home Specialists

From bungalow breakfast nooks to two-flat galley kitchens, we honor original architecture while modernizing flow.

Neighborhood Knowledge

Local zoning variances, permit processes, and utility quirks are second nature to our team.

Personalized Timelines

We schedule demolition during milder months and complete interior work through winter to minimize weather delays.

Ready for a Kitchen That Fits Your Chicago Life?

Schedule your complimentary design consultation with a local remodeling expert.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-kit-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Horizon preserved the 1912 character of our Logan Square two-flat kitchen while adding discreet modern conveniences. The custom-milled oak cabinets match the original trim perfectly, and the hidden dishwasher is a game-changer. They even sourced Chicago common brick to repair the original chimney breast.

Marta K. Historic Kitchen Restoration
“

After our granite cracked during a brutal Chicago winter, Horizon recommended quartz countertops with extra reinforcement. Two years later, they still look brand new despite our kids' constant abuse. The matte finish hides fingerprints beautifully, and the integrated hot pad holder is genius.

James R. Quartz Countertops
“

Converting our Gold Coast condo kitchen to smart technology was seamless with Horizon. The voice-controlled lighting looks like vintage fixtures but responds to commands even during noisy dinner parties. The under-cabinet charging station keeps our devices powered without cluttering the limited counter space.

Lena & Tom W. Smart Kitchen Upgrades
“

Our bungalow's awkward kitchen layout finally makes sense thanks to Horizon's custom cabinets. The narrow pull-out spice racks fit perfectly between studs, and the appliance garage hides our mixer while matching the original trim. The team worked around our irregular walls without a single filler panel.

Carlos D. Custom Cabinetry
“

After my mother moved in, Horizon transformed our Evanston kitchen for multigenerational living. The adjustable-height island lets her prep meals seated while our teenagers can stand. The touch-latch cabinets are easier for her arthritis, and the contrasting edge banding helps with depth perception.

Sophia P. Accessible Kitchen Design
“

Horizon navigated our West Loop loft's strict HOA guidelines while delivering a stunning modern kitchen. The floating shelves showcase our collection of Chicago-themed pottery, and the waterfall island anchors the open space perfectly. They completed the project two weeks ahead of schedule despite supply chain delays.

Raj N. Full Kitchen Remodel

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you prevent cabinet doors from sticking in humid summers?
We leave precise expansion gaps and use moisture-resistant finishes. For particularly problematic areas, we install dehumidifier systems within cabinetry.
Can you match my original 1920s kitchen trim?
Our woodshop maintains profiles for common Chicago bungalow details. We'll take samples to recreate period-correct moldings.
